LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ARTHUR SCAMPA, FATANEH SCAMPA, MAGNOLIA PROPERTIES, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM NOV-13-2018 TO LAW AND MOTION AT NOV-15-2018, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER THE AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES. (302/HEK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ARTHUR SCAMPA, MAGNOLIA PROPERTIES, AND FATANEH SCAMPA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COUNT TWO OF THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALLIE HUNTTING IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CIVIL CODE 846 IS A RECREATIONAL IMMUNITY STATUTE THAT DOES NOT APPLY TO THIS CASE AND THUS THE LIMITATION OF THE SCOPE OF THE IMMUNITY IN THAT STATUTE ALSO DOES NOT APPLY TO THIS CASE. THE FORM COMPLAINT USED BY PLAINTIFF COMPORTS WITH THIS UNDERSTANDING OF THE STATUTE. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ARTHUR SCAMPA, FATANEH SCAMPA, MAGNOLIA PROPERTIES, INC.'s Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint.

Defendants Arthur Scampa, Magnolia Properties, and Fataneh Scampa's motion to strike count two of the second cause of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Sallie Huntting is granted without leave to amend. Civil Code 846 is a recreational immunity statute that does not apply to this case and thus the limitation of the scope of the immunity in that statute also does not apply to this case. The form complaint used by plaintiff comports with this understanding of the statute.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
